command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)rm\s+.*-rf\s+~/'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: rm -rf targeting home directory. Use a more specific path."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)rm\s+.*-rf\s+\$HOME'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: rm -rf targeting home directory. Use a more specific path."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)rm\s+.*-rf\s+/[^a-zA-Z]'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: rm -rf targeting root filesystem."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)git\s+push\s.*--force\s.*main'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: Force push to main. Use --force-with-lease or push to a feature branch."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)git\s+push\s.*--force\s.*master'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: Force push to master. Use --force-with-lease or push to a feature branch."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)git\s+reset\s+--hard'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: git reset --hard discards uncommitted work. Commit or stash first."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]\s*)chmod\s+.*777'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"BLOCKED: chmod 777 is a security risk. Use more restrictive permissions."}}' && exit 0; fi; exit 0
